data_collected.source_quote: your name, email address, and phone number when you sign up; device type, operating system information, browser information

purposes_of_collection.source_quote: To improve the Services and conduct research, including training our models

sold_to_third_parties.source_quote: Anthropic does not 'sell' your personal data as that term is defined by applicable laws

shared_for_advertising.source_quote: opt-out of sharing your personal data for targeted advertising to promote our products

used_to_train_ai.source_quote: We may use your Inputs and Outputs to train our models and improve our Services, unless you opt out through your account settings

third_party_recipients.source_quote: Data shared with affiliates, service providers, and business partners for operational purposes

retention_period.value: Until account deletion; conversations deleted within 30 days; varies by data type
retention_period.source_quote: Anthropic retains your personal data for as long as reasonably necessary; conversations can be deleted immediately with automatic backend deletion within 30 days

access_your_data.source_quote: the right to request a copy of the personal data Anthropic processes about you

delete_your_data.source_quote: the right to request that we delete personal data collected from you when you use our Services

correct_inaccuracies.source_quote: we will make a reasonable effort to correct this information

opt_out_of_sale_sharing.source_quote: opt-out of sharing your personal data for targeted advertising; opt out through your account settings

data_portability.source_quote: the right to port your information

appeal_decisions.source_quote: you may have the right to appeal requests that we deny

honors_gpc.source_quote: we will honor global privacy controls

childrens_privacy.notes: Services are not directed towards children under 18. Anthropic does not knowingly collect information from children under 18. Parents/guardians can contact privacy@anthropic.com if a child's data was provided.
childrens_privacy.source_quote: Our Services are not directed towards, and we do not knowingly collect, use, disclose, sell, or share any information from children under the age of 18

label_notes: Anthropic has a comprehensive privacy policy with clear opt-out mechanisms for model training and targeted advertising. The company explicitly states it does not sell personal data. Regional variations for Canada, Brazil, and South Korea are available but not detailed in fetched excerpt. Security measures are mentioned broadly but specific implementations are not detailed. Policy emphasizes user control over data use in model training.
